positive: Minimalist circular badge design featuring a geometric arrangement of forest woodland elements: stylized deer antler silhouette, delicate fern fronds, and pine sprigs, interwoven around a central, glowing crescent moon. The style should be modern botanical etching, with clean black lines on a muted beige background. The composition must be highly symmetrical and suitable for direct garment printing, emphasizing strong contrast and negative space. Clean vector art, high contrast, detailed linework, emblem, woodland theme, natural elements, symmetry.
